issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage, such as download failures or port conflicts.
The instructions rely on bash commands (wget, chmod) that may not work on non-Unix platforms, limiting cross-platform usability.
Downloads are performed without checksum verification, which could allow tampered files.

scenarios.name: Package a custom GGUF model as a distributable single-file binary
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented `./llamafile --model <gguf> --create <output>.llamafile` pattern with a baked-in system prompt; baseline suggests llama.cpp/Docker wrappers and misses the single-file packaging command.

scenarios.name: Batch-summarize a directory of log files using a local llamafile with no server
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented `--cli` mode piping stdin with `--system` and `--temp`, matching the skill's batch-processing pattern; baseline spins up the HTTP server and curls it, which works but ignores the simpler one-shot CLI path.
